org.key_project.util.java.thread
 
  • Classes in org.key_project.util.java.thread used by org.key_project.util.java.thread
    Class
    Description
    AbstractRunnableWithException
    Provides a basic implementation of IRunnableWithException.
    IRunnableWithException
    A Runnable that provides access to an exception that occurred during execution IRunnableWithException.getException().
    IRunnableWithResult
    A Runnable that has a result that is accessible via IRunnableWithResult.getResult().
